## Smart contract task

### Summary

Describe the Soroban contract work for OpenCred.

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Contract scaffold remains intact
- [ ] Rust Soroban entrypoints or storage schema defined
- [ ] No credential business logic implemented in the scaffold

### Notes

The Soroban contract is intentionally scaffolded with comments only. Contributors should define contract behavior through issue planning.
